skills.title: Web 3 Engineering
skills.description: Experienced in the development of web-based blockchain ecosystems combining traditional software engineering aspects with modern web 3 practices

skills.title: Market Analytics
skills.description: In-depth insights on cryptocurrency market movements backed by data-driven analysis and real-time monitoring of market trends, trading volumes, and price fluctuations

skills.description: Strategic brand development and growth services to help businesses establish a strong presence in the web 3 space, including brand identity, marketing strategies, and community engagement

skills.description: Comprehensive management services for artists and musicians in the web 3 ecosystem, including career development, marketing, and leveraging blockchain technology for fan engagement and monetization
